## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this PR change and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- Link the issue this PR fixes or relates to, e.g. `Fixes #123` or `Relates to #45`. Write `None` if this is a standalone change. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Tests only

## How was this tested?

<!-- Describe the test plan you ran. Check the boxes that apply. -->

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `npx prettier --check .` passes locally
- [ ] New unit test(s) added
- [ ] New integration test(s) added
- [ ] Manually verified against the live CLI (`mendeley ...`)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project style (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] I have updated [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md) under "Unreleased"
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation (README, `--help` text, etc.)
- [ ] I have added tests that prove the fix or feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally **and** in CI
- [ ] I have considered backward compatibility
